ideas.name: Production Line Optimization
ideas.desc: Analyzes production line OEE (Availability x Performance x Quality), identifies bottleneck stations, and generates throughput optimization plans with shift-level scheduling. Includes station-by-station cycle time vs. takt analysis and defect Pareto.

ideas.name: Predictive Maintenance Scheduling
ideas.desc: Generates predictive maintenance schedules from equipment telemetry and failure models, optimizing technician assignments to minimize unplanned downtime. Monitors sensor data (vibration, temperature, oil pressure), models 30/60/90-day failure probability.

ideas.name: Inventory Rebalancing
ideas.desc: Optimizes multi-warehouse inventory distribution by analyzing stock levels against demand forecasts and generating cost-effective transfer plans. Tracks SKU-level surplus/deficit across facilities with inter-warehouse transfer cost optimization.

ideas.name: Order Status Communication
ideas.desc: Tracks manufacturing orders through fulfillment, generates proactive delay notifications, and drafts customer status updates with shipment details. Identifies delays with root cause, revised dates, recovery actions, and cost impact.

ideas.name: Supplier Risk Monitoring
ideas.desc: Monitors supplier risk across quality, delivery, financial, and geopolitical dimensions with scorecards, disruption alerts, and alternative-sourcing plans. Weighted scoring (quality 30%, delivery 25%, financial 25%, geopolitical 20%) with backup supplier recommendations.
